romanization.notes: Unlike Sarnami, Sranan Tongo does NOT use macron (ā/ī/ū) or underdot (ṭ/ḍ/ṇ) diacritics; it is written with the plain, unaccented Latin alphabet (confirmed by every loanword the Sarnami grammar attributes to Sranan Tongo, e.g. 'lesi', 'seti', 'chapu', 'kaiman', 'savanne' — see docs/byakaran/00-introduction.md and docs/byakaran/09-loan-words-and-neologisms.md — none carry macrons or underdots), so its diacritics list is intentionally empty rather than mirroring Sarnami's, not a placeholder awaiting authoring.
